title: EA to Present at the Nasdaq 49th Investor Conference
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) today announced that Stuart Canfield, CFO, will present at the Nasdaq 49th Investor Conference on Tuesday, December 5, in London, England. During the course of this event, EA may disclose material developments affecting its business and/or financial performance. Listeners may access the event via live audio webcast at http://ir.ea.com. Tuesday, December 5, 2023 Presentation at 9:00 AM GMT / 4:00 AM EST Duration: 30 Minutes.

title: 7 Undervalued Stocks to Pick Up BEFORE the Year-End Rally
text: Finding undervalued stocks to buy isn't as easy as it once was. When Benjamin Graham wrote The Intelligent Investor, finding undervalued stocks involved diving into financial statements, calculating ratios independently, and finding a gap between a company's intrinsic value and the stock priced by the market.

title: Holiday Gaming Rally: 3 Video Game Stocks to Snag Pre-Christmas
text: Investors looking for video game stocks to buy have several choices, and we've compiled a list of the most promising ones. The video game industry has gone from a niche market for arcades and living rooms to an omnipresent, sprawling digital industry.

title: 3 Toys & Games Industry Stocks to Watch in a Gloomy Industry
text: The Zacks Toys - Games - Hobbies industry benefits from robust demand for sports toys, fashion dolls and accessories and STEM toys. Stocks like EA, MAT and JAKK are well-positioned to benefit.

title: 5 Solid Stocks to Buy as Inflation Continues to Decline
text: Inflation is declining steadily and with the holiday season around the corner stocks like DraftKings (DKNG), Electronic Arts (EA), Hilton Worldwide Holdings (HLT), Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) and Skechers U.S.A. (SKX) are likely to benefit.

title: You'll Be Thankful You Bought These 3 Stocks in 2023
text: Recent jobs data suggest a cooling labor market. While unfortunate for job-seekers, this trend sparks optimism among investors that the central bank's rake hiking cycle may have reached its conclusion since its start in 2022.

title: AI will make video games look like nothing you've ever played before
text: In the era where innovation is the linchpin of staying competitive, the video game industry is experiencing a technological renaissance. Generative AI (GAI) will cause a pivotal shift in the industry, enabling a transition from traditional development frameworks to more advanced, AI-driven models.

title: 3 Potential Trillion-Dollar Companies That You Didn't See Coming
text: The future of the economy remains uncertain, with divergent opinions among experts. The Economist has presented a pessimistic view, arguing that high-interest rates will lead to economic policy failures and reduced growth.

title: Electronic Arts: Net Booking Growth Strong On The Back Of EA SPORTS FC Release
text: Electronic Arts has potential for further upside based on strong net booking growth and healthy free cash flow generation. Net bookings and net revenues have continued to see growth, driven in part by the success of the EA SPORTS FC gaming title. The company's solid financial position and growth in free cash flow indicate the ability to fund further growth and potentially increase dividend payouts.

title: 5 Consumer Discretionary Stocks to Buy for the Rest of 2023
text: We have narrowed our search to five consumer discretionary stocks that have strong growth potential for the rest of 2023. These are: LULU, HLT, IHG, EA, LYV.

title: The Ultimate Off-Road Experience Awaits as EA SPORTS™ WRC Launches Worldwide Today
text: REDWOOD CITY, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #EASPORTSWRC--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) today celebrated the launch of EA SPORTS™ WRC, the official game of the FIA World Rally Championship, for PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S and PC via EA App, Epic Store, and Steam. title: Electronic Arts' (EA) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Electronic Arts' (EA) second-quarter fiscal 2024 results reflect strength in new releases, continued live services growth and healthy engagement.

title: Electronic Arts (EA) Q2 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Electronic Arts (EA) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Electronic Arts (EA) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Electronic Arts (EA) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.46 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.27 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.28 per share a year ago.

title: Electronic Arts raises profit outlook as 2Q results top estimates
text: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ:EA) on Wednesday reported fiscal second quarter results that topped analysts' estimates and raised its full-year profit projection on its expectations that its revamped soccer franchise “FC 24” will continue to drive growth. The California-based video game company said it now expects earnings per share (EPS) in the range of $4.10 to $4.66, up from its prior forecast of $3.42 to $3.92.

title: EA's stock rises on improved bottom line, revenue beat
text: Shares of videogame maker Electronic Arts Inc. lit up 4% in extended trading Wednesday after the company reported a jump in net income and revenue that slightly beat analysts' estimates.

title: Electronic Arts Reports Strong Q2 FY24 Results

title: Can Videogame Makers Stage a Turnaround From the 2022 Lows?
text: Videogame sales are steadily rebounding, helping stocks like Microsoft Corporation (MSFT), Electronic Arts (EA) and Nintendo (NTDOY).
